The Essential Guide to Motel Management

MOTEL MANAGEMENT COURSE

The Essential Guide to Motel Management

Running a motel requires structured systems across pricing, operations, staffing, and distribution.

The Essential Guide to Motel Management provides a practical framework designed specifically for independent motel operators.

This is not theory. It is operational structure.

Proven in the Field. Supported by the Industry.

Latest insights featured in Accom News: “How to Win your First 21 Days as a Motel Manager”

Client Reviews

Reviews from our past motel training and consultancy clients, including hospitality students, motel receptionists, motel managers and motel owners. Learn more about Motel Coach.

Frequently Asked Questions

  • Who This Book Is For

    • First-time motel buyers

    • Existing independent operators

    • Staff transitioning into leadership roles

    • Motel Owners seeking structured operational control

    • For Owners looking for a bit more

  • What You’ll Learn

    • Front office systems

    • Housekeeping control frameworks

    • Revenue management fundamentals

    • OTA positioning strategies

    • Direct booking optimisation

    • Cost control discipline

    • Operational checklists

    This is structured knowledge, not surface-level advice.

  • Why It’s Different

    Most hospitality books focus on hotel chains.

    This guide focuses specifically on independent motels operating without brand infrastructure.

    The systems are designed for real operational environments.

  • Relationship to Your Training

    The book forms the foundation of the Motel Coach training framework.

    Operators who want structured implementation, templates, and operational playbooks can explore the full Motel Management Training Course.

    Motel Management Courses

    This turns credibility into conversion.

  • Format & Access

    • Digital edition

    • Instant access

    • Downloadable reference

    • Practical checklists included

    Keep it clear and professional.

Improve your Motel's Profitability.

Operational engineering for independent Australian motels. Moving owners from reactive management to systems-based profitability.
